Then 658 Vighatis according to the traditional version
gives Sravana nakshatra correctly; and according to Sri Raja
gopala Iyer's method gives the week day correctly as Thurs
day.
N. The position ofMandi is taken by some to rectify the
ascendant, not the exact time of birth. In Uttar a Kalamrita we
crot.

Note the Rasi and Navamsa occupied by Mandi and by the
Moon. Find out who is stronger. The Lagna at birth will
correspond to:
(i) The sign occupied by Mandi or the Moon whoever is
stronger; or
(ii) It may be the fifth, seventh or the ninth sign for either of
the two;
(iii) If the navamsa sign occupied by Mandi and the Moon are
stronger than their Rasi positions, the lagna will corre
spond to houses, 1,5,7 or 9 from the stronger of the two.
Here we get nearly ten alternatives. We are lucky since
the author has not covered the remaining two houses also.
